title: Valve begins pre-orders for Steam Machine and imitations like Stim Machine appear
summary: Pre-orders for Valve's console are underway as a French company announces a clone called Stim Machine at the same price.

title: PlayStation 5 sales drop to their lowest level in May since 2000
summary: PS5 sales data records the worst May in decades, affected by high prices and the console's maturity.

title: Eric Barone tortures himself with every detail of Haunted Chocolatier's development
summary: The creator of Stardew Valley shares new updates on his upcoming game, highlighting his perfectionism and the need for patience.

title: GTA 6 generates a wave of news: record demand, weapons, and a possible social network
summary: New details emerge about GTA 6, from the inclusion of a social network similar to TikTok to warnings that demand will outstrip supply.

title: Sony lays off 292 Bungie employees and delays Destiny 2 patches
summary: Mass layoffs at Bungie cause delays in the latest Destiny 2 patch, while Sony insists on its games-as-a-service strategy.

title: Supergirl movie divides critics and audiences at its premiere
summary: Supergirl receives mixed reviews, with some praising its emotional moments and others pointing out narrative flaws.

title: Legendary Nintendo developer Takashi Tezuka cancels his retirement
summary: Takashi Tezuka, a Nintendo veteran, reverses his retirement announcement and will continue at the company.

title: Switch 2 becomes the second best-selling console in U.S. history
summary: Switch 2 sales in its first year in the United States are only surpassed by PS5 in adoption rate.

title: Riot Games officially confirms League of Legends Classic mode
summary: After leaks, Riot announces that League of Legends Classic will arrive soon and promises more details in the future.

title: Guides and secrets of Deltarune Chapter 5 draw attention
summary: The fifth chapter of Deltarune offers alternative routes, secret bosses, and multiple tutorials for players.

title: New Star Fox for Switch 2 sparks mixed opinions
summary: The Star Fox remake on Switch 2 generates debate about its music, characters, and use of VTuber avatars.

title: Battlefield 6 will modify its weapon system to resemble Battlefield 4 more
summary: The next Battlefield 6 update will change long-range combat, addressing community requests.

title: Sekiro: No Defeat anime presents trailer and its director comments on the adaptation
summary: The Sekiro animated series shows a new trailer and its director comments on the challenges of bringing the video game to animation.

title: 28-year-old mystery of Jill Valentine's boyfriend photo in Resident Evil 2 resolved
summary: Fans have finally identified the person appearing in Jill Valentine's photograph, closing a long-standing mystery.

title: By mid-2026, Game of the Year candidates begin to take shape
summary: Several outlets highlight the titles leading the race for GOTY, although there is still no clear favorite.

title: Notable streaming releases for the weekend of June 27
summary: Platforms Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and Disney Plus add new movies and series this week.

title: Summer deals on video games and PC hardware
summary: The Steam Summer Sale and other promotions offer discounts on games, laptops, and PC components.

title: Digital content removal sparks controversy: PlayStation and Netflix at the center
summary: PlayStation removes 551 movies from user accounts and Netflix loses rights to an acclaimed title, reigniting the debate on digital ownership.

title: Tim Sweeney criticizes AI labels on Steam and proposes alternative solutions
summary: The CEO of Epic Games calls Steam's AI labels 'irresponsible' and suggests changes.

title: Creators of Fallout: New Vegas and Skyrim share their perspectives on game design
summary: Josh Sawyer and Bruce Nesmith talk about the complexity of open worlds and the importance of not rushing releases.
